meanings.definition: be or do something to a greater degree
examples: her performance surpasses that of any other student I know
This car outperforms all others in its class
A black limousine passed by when she looked out the window
He passed his professor in the hall
One line of soldiers surpassed the other

meanings.definition: be greater in scope or size than some standard
examples: Their loyalty exceeds their national bonds

meanings.definition: exceeding or surpassing usual limits especially in excellence
far beyond what is usual in magnitude or degree
examples: olympian efforts to save the city from bankruptcy
